summary: Build paragraph-grouping splitter (for prose texts like sermons)
description:
## Goal

Implement the paragraph-grouping splitter for prose-only texts (sermons, treatises) lacking explicit section markers.

## Behaviour

- Split text on blank-line paragraph boundaries.
- Bundle `group_size` paragraphs per chunk (typically 2-4).
- If a bundle exceeds `max_tokens`, reduce `group_size` for that bundle and continue.
- Synthesize section labels from a running counter (e.g. `Section 1`, `Section 2`).

## Acceptance Criteria

- No chunk splits mid-paragraph
- No chunk exceeds `max_tokens`
- Section labels are sequential and unique within the text

resolution.note: scripts/chunkers/paragraph_splitter.py — split(). Blank-line paragraph splitting, group_size bundles, sequential Section {n} labels.
